headline: Disney CFO Hugh Johnston Says Relationship With NFL Remains 'Broad And Deep' Even As ESPN Yet To Engage In NFL Renewal Talks
summary: On Wednesday, Walt Disney Co. said ESPN has not yet entered discussions with the NFL about renewing its media rights agreement early, though the company expects its relationship with the league to continue well into the future. Disney Says NFL...
